sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (event_time DateTime) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY event_time;
SELECT event_time, toStartOfFiveMinutes(event_time) AS rounded_time FROM test_dates;
UPDATE test_dates SET event_time = toStartOfFiveMinutes(event_time) WHERE event_time > toDateTime('2023-04-21 10:18:00');
SELECT DISTINCT toStartOfFiveMinutes(event_time) AS intervals FROM test_dates WHERE event_time < now();
